subject: fix(audit): sweep 2 — docs, touch targets, code quality, debug, perf
body:
Phase A — Critical docs (user-facing confusion):
- TutorialModal step 3: "Tap Reset" → "select All or adjust radius directly"
- TESTING_GUIDE item 15: rewritten for actual filter reset flow
- TESTING_GUIDE PWA section: fix duplicate numbering (28-30 → 31-33)
- USER_GUIDE: add empty-state "Reset Filters" button info

Phase B — Touch targets (6 WCAG AA violations):
- LocationSearch "Clear" history: add minHeight 44
- Toast action button: paddingVertical 4→8, minHeight 36, hitSlop
- Station detail retry/go-back: add minHeight 44
- TutorialModal back/next: add minHeight 44
- LocationSearch clear (X): hitSlop 8→14 vertical (44px effective)
- InstallInstructionsModal close: add hitSlop

Phase C — Code quality (7 fixes):
- usePWAUpdate: import constants from config.ts (DRY)
- useLocation: import GPS_TIMEOUT_MS from config.ts (DRY)
- useLocation: clear GPS timeout on success (memory leak fix)
- usePWAUpdate: reset updatePendingRef after 10s safety timeout
- Toast: comment explaining hardcoded warning text color
- formatting.ts: NaN guards on formatPrice/formatDistance (return "—")
- _layout.tsx: narrow navTheme useMemo deps to specific color values

Phase D — Debug logs (6 additions):
- useTheme: theme combo change, dark/light toggle
- usePWAInstall: install prompt triggered, prompt result, appinstalled
- FuelMapWeb: layer colors updated, data updated (station count)

Phase E — Performance (2 optimizations):
- Toast: wrap ToastItem in React.memo
- Toast: extract onDismiss as useCallback (stable reference for memo)

Tags: audit, docs, accessibility, code-quality, debug, performance
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep-2
Semver: patch
